'''Operation Ram's Head''' was an operation devised and performed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Background==
Operation Ram's Head was conceived after flight data from the [[Operation Grain Snatch|destruction]] of the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Sarsuma]]'' suggested that a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] could be disabled by ramming the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] tower. The concept became more feasible after the defection of the [[Leafar]] and the capture of several [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] test base by the BFF-1 bulk freighter ''[[Ashanti]]''. Study of the captured ships indicated that the Galactic Empire was experimenting on a new type of [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield]], designated the [[Shield X]].

==The operation==
[[File:Ramsheadoperation.png|thumb|left|210px|The ''Ram's Head'', about to smash into an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer's]] command tower.]]

The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] decided to capture three [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]], using the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] ''[[Leary]]'' to reach them and the [[MC80 Liberty Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Liberty'' type Star Cruiser]] ''[[Cathleen]]'' to collect them afterwards.

The Assault Gunboats were used by the Alliance to infiltrate a secret Imperial base where the Shield X project was being conducted. There they captured the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ram's Head|''Blade 5'']], which bore the mechanism.

The corvette was renamed ''Ram's Head'', and after final preparations by technicians from the corvette ''[[Libra]]'', she was then sent to ram an array of [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] docked in the [[Imperial Drydock IV]]. The operation was a total success, as the ''Ram's Head'' caused enormous damage to each of the Star Destroyers by tearing apart their towers.

It is unknown what happened to the ''Ram's Head'' as it was not destroyed and was seen traveling into space without a crew.

==Behind the scenes==
This event is portrayed in Operations 18 through 20 in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] expansion, [[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit|''Imperial Pursuit'']].
